steps: File NTA Form 11 refund claim for JPY 119,850 overpaid withholding tax on Nintendo dividend
Submit evidence of JP-NO treaty entitlement to 10% rate vs. 15% applied by MUFG
Request MUFG provide amended tax reporting reflecting correct 10% treaty rate
Follow up with NTA on refund processing timeline and any additional documentation needed

references.title: NTA – Refund of Overpaid Withholding Tax (Form 11)
